join_order.notes: Use sub.adsh keys after fy filter and directly lookup fact rowid posting slices in num_adsh_fk_hash; apply USD and non-null filters while scanning posting rowids.

data_structures.fact_join: pre_built_index(num_adsh_fk_hash posting slices keyed by adsh)
data_structures.aggregation: thread_local direct_array(filtered_sub_cardinality) with final compact_hash_map rollup for (name,cik) and cik

optimization_notes: Root cause is logical/physical overwork in fact access: the current plan uses num.adsh.triple_ranges over a tag-version posting structure even though Q3 joins only on adsh, adding avoidable per-entry indirection inside the hot scan. Strategy Category A/C: restructure join probing to use num_adsh_fk_hash directly from filtered sub(adsh, fy=2022), scan only those posting rowids, and keep per-thread direct-array aggregation with a small final rollup for HAVING and top-k.
